/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/eventloop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/poller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/tcpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/tcpconnection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/tcpserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/__/net/src/timestamp.cpp.o -o /home/gwl/allcode/qinyunserver/bin/main
